name: NIS2 Directive — Network and Information Security

controls.title: Policies on risk analysis and information system security
controls.description: Essential and important entities shall take appropriate and proportionate technical, operational and organisational measures to manage risks posed to the security of network and information systems. These measures shall include: policies on risk analysis and information system security.

controls.title: Incident handling — detection, analysis, containment and response
controls.description: Entities shall implement measures covering incident handling: detection, analysis, containment, response and recovery from incidents. This includes defined procedures for each phase and clear escalation paths.

controls.title: Business continuity — backup management, disaster recovery, crisis management
controls.description: Entities shall implement business continuity measures including backup management and disaster recovery, and crisis management procedures to ensure continuity of network and information systems.

controls.title: Supply chain security — relationships with direct suppliers and service providers
controls.description: Entities shall address supply chain security including security aspects concerning the relationships between each entity and its direct suppliers or service providers. This includes assessing the security practices of suppliers.

controls.title: Security in network and information systems acquisition, development and maintenance
controls.description: Entities shall implement security measures in the acquisition, development and maintenance of network and information systems, including vulnerability handling and disclosure.

controls.title: Policies and procedures to assess effectiveness of cybersecurity risk management
controls.description: Entities shall have policies and procedures to assess the effectiveness of cybersecurity risk-management measures, including testing and auditing procedures.

controls.title: Basic cyber hygiene practices and cybersecurity training
controls.description: Entities shall implement basic cyber hygiene practices and cybersecurity training for all personnel, including awareness of phishing, social engineering and safe use of IT systems.

controls.title: Policies and procedures on cryptography and encryption
controls.description: Entities shall have policies and procedures on the use of cryptography and, where appropriate, encryption to protect data in transit and at rest.

controls.title: Human resources security — access control and asset management
controls.description: Entities shall implement human resources security measures, including access control policies and asset management for all personnel including contractors.

controls.title: Multi-factor authentication and secured communications
controls.description: Entities shall use multi-factor authentication or continuous authentication solutions, secured voice, video and text communications, and secured emergency communication systems where appropriate.
